name: Lump-Sum Social Security Benefit Election

eligibility.description: Taxpayers who receive a lump-sum Social Security payment that includes benefits attributable to one or more prior taxable years.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers receiving a lump-sum payment for prior years to elect to calculate the taxable portion as if it were received in those prior years, preventing a tax bracket spike.
